title: Luke Robinson (rugby league)
description: English rugby league coach and former England international rugby league footballer
extract:
Luke Robinson (born 25 July 1984) is an English professional rugby league coach who was head coach of Huddersfield Giants in the Super League from 2024-26, and a former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 2000s and 2010s.
An England international, he played in the Super League for the Wigan Warriors, Castleford Tigers, Salford City Reds and the Huddersfield Giants as a scrum-half and later in his career as a hooker.
